---
title: "Paper plots"
author: "Prenom:Kyuhan, nom:Kim"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::downcute:
    self_contained: yes
    thumbnails: false
    lightbox: true
    gallery: false
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 10
    fig_height: 8
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev = "png",
  dpi = 160,
  echo = FALSE,
  cache = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.path = "Figures/"
)

library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(SBC)
library(purrr)
library(scales)
library(stringr)

theme_set(theme_cowplot())

source("../data/Albacore_Data.R")
source("../utils/pipeline_utils.R")
source("../utils/simulation.R")
source("../utils/sbc_utils.R")
source("../utils/helpers.R")

manifest_file <- "../results/results_manifest.rds"
files <- list.files("../results", pattern = "^sbc_.*\\.(rds|RData)$", full.names = TRUE)

all_results <- list()
all_nsamples <- list()
all_nchains <- list()

if (file.exists(manifest_file)) {
  manifest <- readRDS(manifest_file)
  for (name in names(manifest)) {
    entry <- manifest[[name]]
    all_results[[name]] <- entry$results
    all_nsamples[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nsample
    all_nchains[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nchains
  }
} else {
  for (f in files) {
    entry <- read_sbc_result_file(f)
    name <- entry$name
    all_results[[name]] <- entry$results
    all_nsamples[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nsample
    all_nchains[[name]] <- entry$metadata$nchains
  }
}

has_sbc_results <- length(all_results) > 0

require_sbc_diag_column <- function(result, result_name, table_name, column_name) {
  diag_tbl <- result[[table_name]]
  if (is.null(diag_tbl)) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "Missing SBC diagnostics table '%s' for result '%s'.",
      table_name, result_name
    ))
  }
  if (!column_name %in% names(diag_tbl)) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "Missing SBC diagnostics column '%s' in '%s' for result '%s'. Available columns: %s",
      column_name, table_name, result_name, paste(names(diag_tbl), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }
  diag_tbl[[column_name]]
}

validate_sbc_diagnostics <- function(results_list) {
  if (length(results_list) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  invisible(imap(results_list, function(result, result_name) {
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_divergent")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_max_treedepth")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "backend_diagnostics", "max_chain_time")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "default_diagnostics", "min_ess_bulk")
    require_sbc_diag_column(result, result_name, "default_diagnostics", "max_rhat")
    TRUE
  }))
}

manuscript_fig_dir <- "../figures_generated"
dir.create(manuscript_fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

save_manuscript_plot <- function(plot_obj, filename, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300) {
  if (is.null(plot_obj)) return(invisible(NULL))
  if (inherits(plot_obj, "ggplot")) {
    plot_obj <- plot_obj +
      labs(title = NULL, subtitle = NULL) +
      theme(plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank())
  }
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(manuscript_fig_dir, filename),
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = dpi,
    limitsize = FALSE,
    bg = "white"
  )
  invisible(plot_obj)
}

save_plot_grid <- function(plot_list, filename, ncol = 1, width = 12, height = 8, labels = NULL) {
  plot_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), plot_list)
  if (length(plot_list) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = ncol, labels = labels)
  save_manuscript_plot(p, filename, width = width, height = height)
  invisible(p)
}

save_shared_legend_plot_grid <- function(plot_list, filename, ncol = 2, width = 16, height = 12) {
  plot_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), plot_list)
  if (length(plot_list) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  plot_titles <- names(plot_list)
  if (is.null(plot_titles)) {
    plot_titles <- rep("", length(plot_list))
  }

  legend <- cowplot::get_legend(
    plot_list[[1]] +
      theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.box.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 2, l = 2)
      )
  )

  n_plots <- length(plot_list)
  nrow <- ceiling(n_plots / ncol)
  plot_list_trimmed <- lapply(seq_along(plot_list), function(i) {
    row_idx <- ceiling(i / ncol)
    col_idx <- ((i - 1) %% ncol) + 1
    p <- plot_list[[i]] +
      theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(4, 6, 4, 6)
      )
    if (row_idx < nrow) {
      p <- p + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())
    }
    if (col_idx > 1) {
      p <- p + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank())
    }

    model_title <- ggplot() +
      annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               fill = "#D9D9D9", color = "#555555", linewidth = 0.6) +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = plot_titles[[i]],
               fontface = "bold", size = 4.5) +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE) +
      theme_void()

    framed_plot <- p +
      theme(
        plot.background = element_rect(color = "#666666", fill = "white", linewidth = 0.6)
      )

    cowplot::plot_grid(
      model_title,
      framed_plot,
      ncol = 1,
      rel_heights = c(0.085, 0.915)
    )
  })

  grid <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list_trimmed, ncol = ncol, align = "hv")
  combined <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    grid,
    legend,
    ncol = 1,
    rel_heights = c(1, 0.08)
  )
  save_manuscript_plot(combined, filename, width = width, height = height)
  invisible(combined)
}

panel_slug <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_\\.-]+", "", x)
  tolower(x)
}

param_label_parse <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, format_parameter_label_plotmath, character(1))
}

save_plot_list_panels <- function(plot_list, prefix, width = 10, height = 8) {
  if (length(plot_list) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  nm <- names(plot_list)
  if (is.null(nm)) nm <- seq_along(plot_list)
  for (i in seq_along(plot_list)) {
    p <- plot_list[[i]]
    if (is.null(p)) next
    file_nm <- sprintf("%s__%s.png", prefix, panel_slug(nm[[i]]))
    save_manuscript_plot(p, file_nm, width = width, height = height)
  }
  invisible(NULL)
}

grid_layout_dims <- function(n_panels, panel_w = 6.0, panel_h = 4.0, max_cols = 2, max_h = 14) {
  if (n_panels <= 0) return(list(ncol = 1L, width = 12, height = 8))
  ncol <- min(max_cols, n_panels)
  nrow <- ceiling(n_panels / ncol)
  width <- panel_w * ncol
  height <- min(max_h, max(4, panel_h * nrow))
  list(ncol = ncol, width = width, height = height)
}

paper_theme <- function(base_size = 13) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.3),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      legend.text = element_text(size = base_size),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2),
      plot.title.position = "plot",
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size + 2),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0.8, "lines")
    )
}

add_sbc_model_cv_groups <- function(df, model_col = "model_name") {
  raw_vals <- as.character(df[[model_col]])
  compact_labels <- vapply(raw_vals, format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  m <- stringr::str_match(compact_labels, "^(.*)_(cv[^_]+|no)$")
  model_group <- ifelse(is.na(m[, 2]), compact_labels, m[, 2])
  cv_group <- ifelse(is.na(m[, 3]), "unknown", m[, 3])

  cv_levels <- c("no", "cv0.1", "cv0.3", "cv0.5", sort(unique(cv_group)))
  cv_levels <- unique(cv_levels)
  cv_levels <- cv_levels[cv_levels %in% unique(cv_group)]

  model_group_pretty <- gsub("_", " ", model_group, fixed = TRUE)
  mm <- stringr::str_match(model_group_pretty, "^(ct|nct)\\s+(.+)$")
  family_vals <- ifelse(is.na(mm[, 3]), model_group_pretty, mm[, 3])
  family_priority <- c("fmax", "if", "soft", "soft2")
  family_levels <- c(
    intersect(family_priority, unique(family_vals)),
    setdiff(unique(family_vals), family_priority)
  )
  model_levels_ct <- character(0)
  model_levels_nct <- character(0)
  for (fam in family_levels) {
    ct_label <- paste("ct", fam)
    nct_label <- paste("nct", fam)
    if (ct_label %in% model_group_pretty) model_levels_ct <- c(model_levels_ct, ct_label)
    if (nct_label %in% model_group_pretty) model_levels_nct <- c(model_levels_nct, nct_label)
  }
  model_levels <- unique(c(model_levels_ct, model_levels_nct, unique(model_group_pretty)))

  df$model_group <- factor(model_group_pretty, levels = model_levels)
  df$cv_group <- factor(cv_group, levels = cv_levels)
  df
}

paper_cv_labeller <- labeller(cv_group = as_labeller(c(
  "no" = "No obs. info",
  "cv0.1" = "CV=0.1",
  "cv0.3" = "CV=0.3",
  "cv0.5" = "CV=0.5"
)))

format_cv_label <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- as.character(x)
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr == "no" ~ "No obs. info",
    grepl("^cv", x_chr) ~ paste0("CV=", sub("^cv", "", x_chr)),
    TRUE ~ x_chr
  )
}

save_sbc_perf_panel_plots <- function(
    plot_data,
    x_col,
    prefix,
    x_label,
    x_scale = NULL,
    x_vline = NULL,
    bins = 25,
    angle_x = FALSE) {
  groups <- levels(plot_data$model_group)
  groups <- groups[groups %in% unique(as.character(plot_data$model_group))]
  cv_vals <- unique(as.character(plot_data$cv_group))
  cv_vals <- cv_vals[!is.na(cv_vals)]
  for (grp in groups) {
    for (cv in cv_vals) {
      dd <- dplyr::filter(plot_data, model_group == grp, as.character(cv_group) == cv)
      if (nrow(dd) == 0) next
      p <- ggplot(dd, aes(x = .data[[x_col]])) +
        geom_histogram(bins = bins, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
        labs(x = x_label, y = "Frequency") +
        paper_theme() +
        theme(
          legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_blank(),
          strip.background = element_blank(),
          strip.text = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)
        )
      if (!is.null(x_scale)) p <- p + x_scale
      if (!is.null(x_vline)) p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = x_vline, linetype = "dashed")
      if (isTRUE(angle_x)) p <- p + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
      save_manuscript_plot(
        p,
        sprintf("%s__%s__cv_%s.png", prefix, panel_slug(grp), panel_slug(cv)),
        width = 7,
        height = 4.5
      )
    }
  }
  invisible(NULL)
}

if (has_sbc_results) {
  validate_sbc_diagnostics(all_results)
}

list_plot_rds <- function(dir_path, pattern) {
  if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) return(character())
  files <- list.files(dir_path, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(files) == 0) return(character())
  info <- file.info(files)
  files[order(info$mtime, decreasing = TRUE)]
}

prior_only_rds_files <- list_plot_rds("../results/prior_only", "^prior_only_plot_data_.*\\.rds$")
albacore_rds_files <- list_plot_rds("../results/albacore_fits", "^albacore_fits_plot_data_.*\\.rds$")

keep_run <- function(run_name) {
  !grepl("_no$", format_sbc_run_label(run_name))
}

paper_results <- all_results[vapply(names(all_results), keep_run, logical(1))]
paper_nsamples <- all_nsamples[names(paper_results)]
paper_nchains <- all_nchains[names(paper_results)]
has_paper_sbc_results <- length(paper_results) > 0

parse_sbc_stem <- function(x) {
  m <- stringr::str_match(x, "^(?:sbc_|\\w*SBC(?:dep)?_)?(.+?)\\.stan_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_.+$")
  data.frame(
    run_id = x,
    model_key = ifelse(is.na(m[, 2]), x, m[, 2]),
    adapt_key = ifelse(is.na(m[, 3]), NA_character_, m[, 3]),
    cv_key = ifelse(is.na(m[, 4]), NA_character_, m[, 4]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

paper_model_groups <- list()
if (has_paper_sbc_results) {
  parsed <- parse_sbc_stem(names(paper_results))
  paper_model_groups <- split(parsed$run_id, parsed$model_key)
}
```

# SBC truth-simulation workflow

```{r paper_sbc_truth_workflow, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(13.5,5.8)}
workflow_boxes <- tibble::tribble(
  ~xmin, ~xmax, ~ymin, ~ymax, ~fill,      ~label,
  0.40,  3.82,  2.20,  3.08,  "#DCEAF7",  "1. Draw from Prior\nK, r, q, σ², τ²",
  4.05,  7.78,  2.20,  3.08,  "#E6F4DE",  "2. Simulate Dataset\nR model: feasible truth\n+ abundance index",
  8.00,  11.48, 2.20,  3.08,  "#F9E8D5",  "3. Fit Model Variants\n8 variants",
  11.72, 15.38, 2.20,  3.08,  "#F6DEE8",  "4. Summarise SBC ranks\nECDF +\nHMC diagnostics"
)

workflow_arrows <- tibble::tribble(
  ~x,   ~xend, ~y,  ~yend,
  3.82, 4.05,  2.62, 2.62,
  7.78, 8.00,  2.62, 2.62,
  11.48, 11.72, 2.62, 2.62
)

p_workflow <- ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = workflow_boxes,
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
    fill = workflow_boxes$fill,
    colour = "grey35",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = workflow_arrows,
    aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.18, "inches"), type = "closed"),
    linewidth = 0.5,
    colour = "grey30"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = workflow_boxes,
    aes(x = (xmin + xmax) / 2, y = (ymin + ymax) / 2, label = label),
    parse = FALSE,
    size = 4.8,
    lineheight = 1.02,
    family = "",
    fontface = "plain"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 0.40, xend = 7.78, y = 3.34, yend = 3.34,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    colour = "grey35"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 0.40, xend = 0.40, y = 3.34, yend = 3.22,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    colour = "grey35"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 7.78, xend = 7.78, y = 3.34, yend = 3.22,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    colour = "grey35"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 4.0, y = 3.48,
    label = "Simulation using a generative model in R",
    size = 5.0,
    colour = "grey25"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 0.40, xend = 11.48, y = 1.96, yend = 1.96,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    colour = "grey35"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 0.40, xend = 0.40, y = 1.96, yend = 2.08,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    colour = "grey35"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 11.48, xend = 11.48, y = 1.96, yend = 2.08,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    colour = "grey35"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 5.85, y = 1.78,
    label = "Repeat 2000 times",
    size = 4.8,
    colour = "grey25"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.22, 15.50), ylim = c(1.66, 3.62), clip = "off") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_void(base_size = 13.5) +
  theme()

print(p_workflow)
save_manuscript_plot(p_workflow, "paper_sbc_truth_workflow.png", width = 15.7, height = 5.7)
```

```{r paper_constraint_mechanisms_actual, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(13.5,6.0)}
bound <- 1
soft_clip <- 0.99 * bound
smoothness <- 50
eps <- 1e-4

catch_x <- seq(0, 1.6, length.out = 1200)

hard_if_df <- tibble::tibble(
  x = c(catch_x[catch_x <= bound], bound, catch_x[catch_x > bound]),
  y = c(catch_x[catch_x <= bound], soft_clip, rep(soft_clip, sum(catch_x > bound))),
  curve = "Hard clip (`if`)"
)

catch_df <- tibble::tibble(
  x = catch_x
) |>
  mutate(
    x_safe = pmax(x, 1e-8),
    soft_logmin = exp(-(log(exp(-smoothness * log(x_safe)) +
                              exp(-smoothness * log(soft_clip)))) / smoothness),
    boundary = soft_clip
  ) |>
  select(-x_safe) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(soft_logmin, boundary),
    names_to = "curve",
    values_to = "y"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    curve = recode(
      curve,
      soft_logmin = "Soft log-min (`soft`)",
      boundary = "Feasible limit"
    )
  ) |>
  bind_rows(hard_if_df)

biomass_df <- tibble::tibble(
  x = seq(-0.08, 0.25, length.out = 500)
) |>
  mutate(
    raw = if_else(x >= 0, x, NA_real_),
    hard_fmax = pmax(x, eps),
    softplus = log1p(exp(smoothness * x)) / smoothness + eps
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(raw, hard_fmax, softplus),
    names_to = "curve",
    values_to = "y"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    curve = recode(
      curve,
      raw = "Unconstrained update",
      hard_fmax = "Hard floor (`fmax`)",
      softplus = "Softplus floor (`soft`, `soft2`)"
    )
  )

penalty_df <- tibble::tibble(
  x = seq(-0.12, 0.12, length.out = 500)
) |>
  mutate(
    excess = log1p(exp(smoothness * x)) / smoothness,
    soft_penalty = (excess / 0.01)^2 / 2
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(soft_penalty),
    names_to = "curve",
    values_to = "y"
  ) |>
  mutate(curve = "Soft penalty (`soft2`)") 

boundary_line_color <- "#D95F02"
boundary_text_color <- "#A64B00"
boundary_line_type <- "dashed"
boundary_line_width <- 0.8

soft_catch_at_1p08 <- exp(-(log(exp(-smoothness * log(1.08)) +
                                  exp(-smoothness * log(soft_clip)))) / smoothness)
soft_catch_at_1p10 <- exp(-(log(exp(-smoothness * log(1.10)) +
                                  exp(-smoothness * log(soft_clip)))) / smoothness)
soft_floor_at_0p02 <- log1p(exp(smoothness * 0.020)) / smoothness + eps
soft_floor_at_0p03 <- log1p(exp(smoothness * 0.030)) / smoothness + eps
soft_penalty_at_0p015 <- ((log1p(exp(smoothness * 0.015)) / smoothness) / 0.01)^2 / 2
soft_penalty_at_0p020 <- ((log1p(exp(smoothness * 0.020)) / smoothness) / 0.01)^2 / 2

constraint_colors <- c(
  "Hard clip (`if`)" = "#D95F02",
  "Soft log-min (`soft`)" = "#1B9E77",
  "Feasible limit" = "#6B6B6B",
  "Unconstrained update" = "#6B6B6B",
  "Hard floor (`fmax`)" = "#D95F02",
  "Softplus floor (`soft`, `soft2`)" = "#1B9E77",
  "Soft penalty (`soft2`)" = "#1B9E77"
)

constraint_ltys <- c(
  "Hard clip (`if`)" = "solid",
  "Soft log-min (`soft`)" = "solid",
  "Feasible limit" = "dashed",
  "Unconstrained update" = "solid",
  "Hard floor (`fmax`)" = "solid",
  "Softplus floor (`soft`, `soft2`)" = "solid",
  "Soft penalty (`soft2`)" = "solid"
)

p_catch_base <- ggplot(
  catch_df |> filter(curve != "Feasible limit"),
  aes(x = x, y = y, color = curve, linetype = curve)
) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = bound, xmax = 1.6, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "#FDE2D5", alpha = 0.45) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.10, y = 0.835, label = "Observed catch > limit",
           color = boundary_text_color, size = 4.45, hjust = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.15) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0.79, xend = 1.6, y = soft_clip, yend = soft_clip,
           color = "grey10", linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 1.05, alpha = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.805, y = soft_clip + 0.0075, label = "Clipped at\n0.99",
           color = "grey10", size = 4.05, hjust = 0, vjust = 0, lineheight = 0.9) +
  annotate("curve", x = 1.04, y = 1.024, xend = 1.01, yend = soft_clip + 0.003,
           curvature = 0.14, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")),
           color = "#D95F02", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.06, y = 1.022, label = "Hard clip\n(discontinuous jump)",
           color = "#D95F02", hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4.35, lineheight = 0.95) +
  annotate("curve", x = 1.15, y = 0.868, xend = 1.10, yend = soft_catch_at_1p10 - 0.004,
           curvature = -0.18, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")),
           color = "#1B9E77", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.18, y = 0.868, label = "Smooth approach",
           color = "#1B9E77", hjust = 0, size = 4.35) +
  labs(
    title = "A. Effective catch",
    x = "Observed catch / feasible limit",
    y = "Effective catch / feasible limit"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = constraint_colors, breaks = c("Hard clip (`if`)", "Soft log-min (`soft`)")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = constraint_ltys, breaks = c("Hard clip (`if`)", "Soft log-min (`soft`)")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.79, 1.6), ylim = c(0.8, 1.06), clip = "on") +
  paper_theme(14.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(8, 24, 8, 8)
  )

p_catch <- p_catch_base

p_biomass <- ggplot(
  biomass_df |> filter(curve != "Unconstrained update"),
  aes(x = x, y = y, color = curve, linetype = curve)
) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -0.08, xmax = 0, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "#FDE2D5", alpha = 0.45) +
  annotate("text", x = -0.040, y = 0.19, label = "Pre-floor update < 0",
           color = boundary_text_color, size = 4.25, angle = 90,
           hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.15) +
  annotate("curve", x = 0.090, y = 0.030, xend = 0.004, yend = eps,
           curvature = -0.30, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")),
           color = "#D95F02", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.098, y = 0.030, label = "Hard floor",
           color = "#D95F02", hjust = 0, size = 4.35) +
  annotate("curve", x = 0.080, y = 0.148, xend = 0.030,
           yend = soft_floor_at_0p03 + 0.006,
           curvature = 0.18, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")),
           color = "#1B9E77", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.088, y = 0.148, label = "Smooth floor",
           color = "#1B9E77", hjust = 0, size = 4.35) +
  labs(
    title = "B. Relative biomass floor",
    x = "Pre-floor next-step relative biomass",
    y = "Adjusted next-step\nrelative biomass"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = constraint_colors, breaks = c("Hard floor (`fmax`)", "Softplus floor (`soft`, `soft2`)")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = constraint_ltys, breaks = c("Hard floor (`fmax`)", "Softplus floor (`soft`, `soft2`)")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.08, 0.25), ylim = c(0, 0.28), clip = "off") +
  paper_theme(14.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(8, 18, 8, 8)
  )

p_penalty <- ggplot(penalty_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = curve, linetype = curve)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 0.12, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "#FDE2D5", alpha = 0.45) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.15) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.060, y = 56, label = "Harvest rate > threshold",
           color = boundary_text_color, size = 4.15, angle = 90,
           hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5) +
  annotate("curve", x = 0.022, y = 22, xend = 0.020, yend = soft_penalty_at_0p020 + 1.2,
           curvature = -0.18, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")),
           color = "#1B9E77", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.022, y = 23, label = "Smooth increase",
           color = "#1B9E77", hjust = 0, size = 4.35) +
  labs(title = "C. Harvest-rate excess", x = expression(H[t] - H[max]), y = "Penalty term") +
  scale_color_manual(values = constraint_colors, breaks = "Soft penalty (`soft2`)") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = constraint_ltys, breaks = "Soft penalty (`soft2`)") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.11, 0.115), ylim = c(0, 75), clip = "off") +
  paper_theme(14.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(8, 24, 8, 8)
  )

panel_row <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_catch, p_biomass, p_penalty,
  nrow = 1,
  align = "h",
  rel_widths = c(1.15, 1, 1)
)

p_constraints <- panel_row

save_manuscript_plot(
  p_constraints,
  "constraint_mechanisms_actual_models.png",
  width = 15.8,
  height = 6.2
)

print(p_constraints)
```

```{r paper_ct_nct_schematic, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
box_df_ct <- tibble(
  xmin = c(0.08, 0.60),
  xmax = c(0.40, 0.92),
  ymin = c(0.28, 0.28),
  ymax = c(0.70, 0.70),
  fill = c("#DCE9F7", "#E6F3DA"),
  title = c("Median state after\nfeasibility step", "Next-state draw"),
  body = c("P[t+1]^med", "P[t+1]")
)

p_ct <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1, fill = "white", alpha = 1) +
  geom_rect(data = box_df_ct, aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = fill),
            color = "#5B5B5B", linewidth = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  annotate("text", x = 0.02, y = 0.98, label = "A. Centred", hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 7.0, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.50, y = 0.84, label = "Draw the next biomass state directly.", size = 5.2) +
  annotate("text", x = c(0.24, 0.76), y = 0.60,
           label = c("Median state after\nfeasibility step", "Next-state\ndraw"),
           size = 4.2, lineheight = 1.0) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.24, y = 0.42, label = "P[t+1]^med", parse = TRUE, size = 5.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.76, y = 0.42, label = "P[t+1]", parse = TRUE, size = 5.8) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0.40, xend = 0.60, y = 0.49, yend = 0.49,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")), linewidth = 0.7) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.50, y = 0.16, label = "The feasibility adjustment enters the draw directly.", size = 4.95) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(4, 6, 4, 6), plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))

box_df_nct <- tibble(
  xmin = c(0.02, 0.34, 0.66),
  xmax = c(0.30, 0.62, 0.98),
  ymin = c(0.28, 0.28, 0.28),
  ymax = c(0.70, 0.70, 0.70),
  fill = c("#DCE9F7", "#FDE2D5", "#E6F3DA")
)

p_nct <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1, fill = "white", alpha = 1) +
  geom_rect(data = box_df_nct, aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = fill),
            color = "#5B5B5B", linewidth = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  annotate("text", x = 0.02, y = 0.98, label = "B. Non-centred", hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 7.0, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.50, y = 0.84, label = "Draw process error, then map it to the next state.", size = 4.95) +
  annotate("text", x = c(0.16, 0.48, 0.82), y = 0.59,
           label = c("Median state after\nfeasibility step", "Process-error\ndraw", "State\nreconstruction"), size = 3.95, lineheight = 1.0) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.16, y = 0.42, label = "P[t+1]^med", parse = TRUE, size = 5.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.48, y = 0.42, label = "u[t+1] %~% N(0,1)", parse = TRUE, size = 5.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.82, y = 0.40,
           label = "P[t+1] == P[t+1]^med %.% exp(sigma %.% u[t+1])",
           parse = TRUE, size = 4.8) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0.30, xend = 0.34, y = 0.49, yend = 0.49,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")), linewidth = 0.7) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0.62, xend = 0.66, y = 0.49, yend = 0.49,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.015, "npc")), linewidth = 0.7) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.50, y = 0.16,
           label = "The feasibility adjustment now affects both the median state and the error-to-state map.",
           size = 4.5) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(4, 6, 4, 6), plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))

p_ct_nct <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_ct, p_nct,
  nrow = 1,
  rel_widths = c(1.00, 1.58),
  align = "h"
)

save_manuscript_plot(
  p_ct_nct,
  "ct_nct_constraint_schematic.png",
  width = 15.8,
  height = 6.2
)

print(p_ct_nct)
```

# Prior-only plots (from saved plot-data RDS)

```{r paper_prior_only_saved_rds_plots, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (length(prior_only_rds_files) == 0) {
  cat("No prior-only plot-data RDS found in ../results/prior_only.\n")
} else {
  prior_plot_params <- paste0("Pt[", 21:23, "]")
  prior_scalar_params <- c("K", "r", "q", "sigma2", "tau2")
  prior_bundles_raw <- lapply(prior_only_rds_files, readRDS)
  bundle_has_softmax <- function(b) {
    if (is.null(b$post_long)) return(FALSE)
    any(grepl("softmax", unique(as.character(b$post_long$model))))
  }
  keep_main_prior_bundle <- !vapply(prior_bundles_raw, bundle_has_softmax, logical(1))
  if (!all(keep_main_prior_bundle)) {
    cat("Skipping softmax sensitivity bundles from the main eight-model prior-only figures: ",
        sum(!keep_main_prior_bundle), "\n")
  }
  prior_bundles_raw <- prior_bundles_raw[keep_main_prior_bundle]
  bundle_has_params <- function(b, params) {
    if (is.null(b$post_long) || is.null(b$sim_long)) return(FALSE)
    post_params <- unique(as.character(b$post_long$param))
    sim_params <- unique(as.character(b$sim_long$param))
    all(params %in% post_params) && all(params %in% sim_params)
  }
  has_prior_pt_bundle <- vapply(prior_bundles_raw, bundle_has_params, logical(1), params = prior_plot_params)
  has_prior_scalar_bundle <- vapply(prior_bundles_raw, bundle_has_params, logical(1), params = prior_scalar_params)
  if (!all(has_prior_pt_bundle)) {
    cat("Skipping prior-only bundles without Pt[21:23] for P[21:23] plot: ",
        sum(!has_prior_pt_bundle), "\n")
  }
  if (!any(has_prior_pt_bundle) && !any(has_prior_scalar_bundle)) {
    stop("No compatible prior-only plot-data bundles found. Re-run analysis/PriorOnly.R.")
  }
  pt_post_long <- if (any(has_prior_pt_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_pt_bundle], `[[`, "post_long")) else NULL
  pt_sim_long <- if (any(has_prior_pt_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_pt_bundle], `[[`, "sim_long")) else NULL
  scalar_post_long <- if (any(has_prior_scalar_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_scalar_bundle], `[[`, "post_long")) else NULL
  scalar_sim_long <- if (any(has_prior_scalar_bundle)) bind_rows(lapply(prior_bundles_raw[has_prior_scalar_bundle], `[[`, "sim_long")) else NULL

  if ((!is.null(pt_post_long) && !is.null(pt_sim_long) && nrow(pt_post_long) > 0 && nrow(pt_sim_long) > 0) ||
      (!is.null(scalar_post_long) && !is.null(scalar_sim_long) && nrow(scalar_post_long) > 0 && nrow(scalar_sim_long) > 0)) {
    xgrid_unit <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 512)
    dens_long_fn <- function(df, out_col, x_limits = c(0, 1), n_grid = 512) {
      parts <- split(df, list(df$model, df$param), drop = TRUE)
      out <- lapply(parts, function(dd) {
        if (nrow(dd) == 0) return(NULL)
        d <- if (is.null(x_limits)) {
          density(dd$value, n = n_grid, na.rm = TRUE)
        } else {
          density(dd$value, from = x_limits[1], to = x_limits[2], n = n_grid, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
        tmp <- data.frame(
          model = as.character(dd$model[1]),
          param = as.character(dd$param[1]),
          idx = seq_along(d$x),
          x = d$x,
          dens = d$y
        )
        names(tmp)[names(tmp) == "dens"] <- out_col
        tmp
      })
      bind_rows(out)
    }
    dens_long_fn_param_limits <- function(df, out_col, param_limits, n_grid = 512) {
      parts <- split(df, list(df$model, df$param), drop = TRUE)
      out <- lapply(parts, function(dd) {
        if (nrow(dd) == 0) return(NULL)
        p <- as.character(dd$param[1])
        lim <- param_limits[[p]]
        if (is.null(lim) || any(!is.finite(lim))) return(NULL)
        d <- density(dd$value, from = lim[1], to = lim[2], n = n_grid, na.rm = TRUE)
        tmp <- data.frame(
          model = as.character(dd$model[1]),
          param = as.character(dd$param[1]),
          idx = seq_along(d$x),
          x = d$x,
          dens = d$y
        )
        names(tmp)[names(tmp) == "dens"] <- out_col
        tmp
      })
      bind_rows(out)
    }

    build_prior_diff_plot <- function(post_df, sim_df, params, filename, title_text,
                                      panel_prefix, x_limits = c(0, 1),
                                      free_x_by_param = FALSE,
                                      aggregate_width = 14, aggregate_height = 8,
                                      panel_width = 6.5, panel_height = 4.8) {
      post_sub <- post_df %>% filter(param %in% params)
      sim_sub <- sim_df %>% filter(param %in% params)
      if (free_x_by_param && "q" %in% params) {
        post_sub <- post_sub %>%
          mutate(value = ifelse(as.character(param) == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value))
        sim_sub <- sim_sub %>%
          mutate(value = ifelse(as.character(param) == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value))
      }
      if (nrow(post_sub) == 0 || nrow(sim_sub) == 0) {
        stop("Prior-only plot-data RDS does not include required parameters for: ", filename)
      }
      missing_params <- setdiff(params, unique(as.character(post_sub$param)))
      if (length(missing_params) > 0) {
        stop("Prior-only plot-data missing parameter(s) for ", filename, ": ",
             paste(missing_params, collapse = ", "))
      }

      if (is.null(x_limits) && !free_x_by_param) {
        xr <- range(c(post_sub$value, sim_sub$value), na.rm = TRUE)
        if (!all(is.finite(xr))) xr <- c(0, 1)
        if (xr[1] == xr[2]) {
          pad <- ifelse(xr[1] == 0, 1, abs(xr[1]) * 0.05)
          xr <- xr + c(-pad, pad)
        } else {
          pad <- 0.03 * diff(xr)
          xr <- xr + c(-pad, pad)
        }
        x_limits <- xr
      }
      observed_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model)))
      ct_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model[grepl("^ct", as.character(post_sub$model))])))
      nct_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model[grepl("^nct", as.character(post_sub$model))])))
      model_levels <- c(ct_models, nct_models)
      if (length(model_levels) == 0) {
        model_levels <- observed_models
      } else {
        model_levels <- unique(c(model_levels, observed_models))
      }
      ncol_prior <- max(1, max(length(ct_models), length(nct_models)))

      post_sub <- post_sub %>%
        mutate(
          model = factor(as.character(model), levels = model_levels),
          param = factor(as.character(param), levels = params)
        )
      sim_sub <- sim_sub %>%
        mutate(
          model = factor(as.character(model), levels = levels(post_sub$model)),
          param = factor(as.character(param), levels = levels(post_sub$param))
        )
      param_levels <- levels(post_sub$param)
      param_label_values <- param_label_parse(param_levels)
      param_label_values[param_levels == "q"] <- "log(q)"
      param_label_values[param_levels == "Pt[23]"] <- "P[1989]"

      if (free_x_by_param) {
        param_limits_tbl <- bind_rows(
          post_sub %>% transmute(param = as.character(param), value = value),
          sim_sub %>% transmute(param = as.character(param), value = value)
        ) %>%
          group_by(param) %>%
          summarise(
            lo = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
            hi = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) %>%
          mutate(
            span = hi - lo,
            pad = ifelse(span > 0, 0.03 * span, pmax(abs(lo), 1) * 0.03),
            lo = lo - pad,
            hi = hi + pad
          )
        param_limits <- setNames(
          lapply(seq_len(nrow(param_limits_tbl)), function(i) c(param_limits_tbl$lo[i], param_limits_tbl$hi[i])),
          param_limits_tbl$param
        )
        post_den <- dens_long_fn_param_limits(
          post_sub, "dens_post", param_limits = param_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit)
        )
      } else {
        post_den <- dens_long_fn(post_sub, "dens_post", x_limits = x_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit))
      }

      sim_truth_base <- sim_sub %>% mutate(model = "__truth__")
      truth_den_base <- if (free_x_by_param) {
        dens_long_fn_param_limits(
          sim_truth_base, "dens_truth", param_limits = param_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit)
        )
      } else {
        dens_long_fn(sim_truth_base, "dens_truth", x_limits = x_limits, n_grid = length(xgrid_unit))
      }
      if (is.null(truth_den_base) || nrow(truth_den_base) == 0) {
        truth_den_base <- tibble(
          param = character(),
          idx = integer(),
          x_truth = numeric(),
          dens_truth = numeric()
        )
      } else {
        truth_den_base <- truth_den_base %>%
          transmute(
            param = as.character(param),
            idx = idx,
            x_truth = x,
            dens_truth = dens_truth
          )
      }
      truth_models <- as.character(levels(post_sub$model))
      if (length(truth_models) == 0) {
        truth_models <- sort(unique(as.character(post_sub$model)))
      }
      truth_den <- truth_den_base[rep(seq_len(nrow(truth_den_base)), each = length(truth_models)), , drop = FALSE]
      truth_den$model <- rep(truth_models, times = nrow(truth_den_base))
      truth_den <- as_tibble(truth_den) %>%
        select(model, param, idx, x_truth, dens_truth)

      den_df <- left_join(
        post_den,
        truth_den %>% select(model, param, idx, x_truth, dens_truth),
        by = c("model", "param", "idx")
      ) %>%
        mutate(
          dens_post = ifelse(is.na(dens_post), 0, dens_post),
          dens_truth = ifelse(is.na(dens_truth), 0, dens_truth),
          x_truth = ifelse(is.na(x_truth), x, x_truth),
          param = factor(param, levels = levels(post_sub$param)),
          model = factor(model, levels = levels(post_sub$model)),
          y0 = as.numeric(param)
        ) %>%
        group_by(model, param) %>%
        mutate(
          dens_post_s = dens_post / max(dens_post, na.rm = TRUE),
          dens_truth_s = dens_truth / max(dens_truth, na.rm = TRUE)
        ) %>%
        ungroup() %>%
        mutate(
          y_post = y0 + 0.85 * dens_post_s,
          y_truth = y0 + 0.85 * dens_truth_s,
          ymin = pmin(y_post, y_truth),
          ymax = pmax(y_post, y_truth),
          diff_dir = ifelse(dens_post_s >= dens_truth_s, "post_gt_truth", "truth_gt_post"),
          diff_dir = factor(
            diff_dir,
            levels = c("post_gt_truth", "truth_gt_post"),
            labels = c("Realised prior > Truth", "Truth > Realised prior")
          )
        ) %>%
        group_by(model, param) %>%
        mutate(
          diff_run = cumsum(diff_dir != dplyr::lag(diff_dir, default = first(diff_dir)))
        ) %>%
        ungroup()

      diff_palette <- c(
        "Realised prior > Truth" = "#0B57A3",
        "Truth > Realised prior" = "#D04A02"
      )
      post_line_colour <- "#3A3A3A"
      truth_line_colour <- "#B80F0A"

      if (free_x_by_param) {
        den_df <- den_df %>%
          mutate(
            param_label = factor(
              ifelse(
                as.character(param) == "q",
                "log(q)",
                format_parameter_label_plotmath(as.character(param))
              ),
              levels = param_label_values
            )
          )

        p_agg <- ggplot() +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, ymin = 0, ymax = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
            fill = "grey70",
            alpha = 0.14,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(
              x = x,
              ymin = pmin(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
              ymax = pmax(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
              fill = diff_dir,
              group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)
            ),
            alpha = 0.82,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, y = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = post_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.35,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x_truth, y = dens_truth_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = truth_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.28,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          facet_grid(
            model ~ param_label,
            scales = "free_x",
            labeller = labeller(param_label = label_parsed)
          ) +
          scale_fill_manual(
            values = diff_palette,
            name = "Difference"
          ) +
          labs(title = title_text, x = "Value", y = "Scaled density") +
          theme_bw() +
          theme(
            strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, size = 13, face = "bold"),
            strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, size = 13, face = "bold"),
            axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
            axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
            panel.spacing.x = unit(1.1, "lines"),
            legend.position = "bottom",
            legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
            legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
          )
      } else {
        p_agg <- ggplot() +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, ymin = y0, ymax = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
            fill = "grey70",
            alpha = 0.14,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = diff_dir, group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)),
            alpha = 0.82,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, y = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = post_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.35,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          geom_line(
            data = den_df,
            aes(x = x, y = y_truth, group = interaction(model, param)),
            colour = truth_line_colour,
            linewidth = 0.28,
            alpha = 0.75
          ) +
          facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_x", nrow = 2, ncol = ncol_prior) +
          scale_fill_manual(
            values = diff_palette,
            name = "Difference"
          ) +
          scale_y_continuous(
            breaks = seq_along(levels(post_sub$param)),
            labels = parse(text = param_label_values)
          ) +
          coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits) +
          labs(title = title_text, x = "Value", y = NULL) +
          theme_bw() +
          theme(
            legend.position = "bottom",
            strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
            axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
            panel.spacing.x = unit(1.1, "lines"),
            legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
            legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
          )
      }

      print(p_agg)
      save_manuscript_plot(p_agg, filename, width = aggregate_width, height = aggregate_height)

      prior_model_levels <- levels(post_sub$model)
      prior_model_levels <- prior_model_levels[prior_model_levels %in% unique(as.character(post_sub$model))]
      for (mdl in prior_model_levels) {
        den_dd <- dplyr::filter(den_df, model == mdl)
        if (nrow(den_dd) == 0) next
        if (free_x_by_param) {
          den_dd <- den_dd %>%
            mutate(
              param_label = factor(
                ifelse(
                  as.character(param) == "q",
                  "log(q)",
                  format_parameter_label_plotmath(as.character(param))
                ),
                levels = param_label_values
              )
            )
          p_panel <- ggplot() +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, ymin = 0, ymax = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
              fill = "grey70",
              alpha = 0.14,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(
                x = x,
                ymin = pmin(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
                ymax = pmax(dens_post_s, dens_truth_s),
                fill = diff_dir,
                group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)
              ),
              alpha = 0.82,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, y = dens_post_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = post_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.35,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x_truth, y = dens_truth_s, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = truth_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.28,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            facet_wrap(~ param_label, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3,
                       labeller = labeller(param_label = label_parsed)) +
            scale_fill_manual(values = diff_palette, guide = "none") +
            labs(x = "Value", y = "Scaled density", subtitle = as.character(mdl)) +
            theme_bw() +
            theme(
              plot.title = element_blank(),
              legend.position = "none",
              strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
              axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
              axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
              axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
              axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)
            )
        } else {
          p_panel <- ggplot() +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, ymin = y0, ymax = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
              fill = "grey70",
              alpha = 0.14,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = diff_dir, group = interaction(model, param, diff_run)),
              alpha = 0.82,
              colour = NA
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, y = y_post, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = post_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.35,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            geom_line(
              data = den_dd,
              aes(x = x, y = y_truth, group = interaction(model, param)),
              colour = truth_line_colour,
              linewidth = 0.28,
              alpha = 0.75
            ) +
            scale_fill_manual(values = diff_palette, guide = "none") +
            scale_y_continuous(
              breaks = seq_along(levels(post_sub$param)),
              labels = parse(text = param_label_values)
            ) +
            coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits) +
            labs(x = "Value", y = NULL, subtitle = as.character(mdl)) +
            theme_bw() +
            theme(
              plot.title = element_blank(),
              strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
              axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
              axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
              axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)
            )
        }
        save_manuscript_plot(
          p_panel,
          sprintf("%s__%s.png", panel_prefix, panel_slug(mdl)),
          width = panel_width,
          height = panel_height
        )
      }
    }

    if (!is.null(pt_post_long) && !is.null(pt_sim_long) && nrow(pt_post_long) > 0 && nrow(pt_sim_long) > 0) {
      build_prior_diff_plot(
        post_df = pt_post_long,
        sim_df = pt_sim_long,
        params = prior_plot_params,
        filename = "prior_only_ridge_difference.png",
        title_text = "Prior-only: P[1987:1989] realised prior vs truth",
        panel_prefix = "prior_only_ridge_difference_panel",
        x_limits = c(0, 1),
        aggregate_width = 14,
        aggregate_height = 9.5,
        panel_width = 8.0,
        panel_height = 4.8
      )
    } else {
      cat("Skipping prior-only P[21:23] difference plot; required parameters not present in saved RDS.\n")
    }

    if (!is.null(scalar_post_long) && !is.null(scalar_sim_long) &&
        all(prior_scalar_params %in% unique(as.character(scalar_post_long$param))) &&
        all(prior_scalar_params %in% unique(as.character(scalar_sim_long$param)))) {
      build_prior_diff_plot(
        post_df = scalar_post_long,
        sim_df = scalar_sim_long,
        params = prior_scalar_params,
        filename = "prior_only_parameter_difference.png",
        title_text = "Prior-only: K, r, q, sigma2, tau2 realised prior vs truth",
        panel_prefix = "prior_only_parameter_difference_panel",
        x_limits = NULL,
        free_x_by_param = TRUE,
        aggregate_width = 16,
        aggregate_height = 10.5,
        panel_width = 8.0,
        panel_height = 6.5
      )
    } else {
      cat("Skipping prior-only scalar-parameter difference plot; required parameters not present in saved RDS.\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("Prior-only plot-data RDS found, but required objects are missing.\n")
  }
}
```

# AlbacoreFits plots (from saved plot-data RDS)

```{r paper_albacorefits_saved_rds_plots, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (length(albacore_rds_files) == 0) {
  cat("No AlbacoreFits plot-data RDS found in ../results/albacore_fits.\n")
} else {
  alb_bundles <- lapply(albacore_rds_files, readRDS)
  bt_long_all <- bind_rows(lapply(alb_bundles, `[[`, "bt_long_all"))
  param_long_all <- bind_rows(lapply(alb_bundles, `[[`, "param_long_all"))

  albacore_scenario_label <- function(x) {
    x_chr <- as.character(x)
    out <- dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("^tau2Prior\\[3\\]=0", x_chr) ~ "Prior predictive distribution",
      grepl("^tau2Prior\\[3\\]=1", x_chr) ~ "Posterior distribution",
      x_chr %in% c("0", "tau0") ~ "Prior predictive distribution",
      x_chr %in% c("1", "tau1") ~ "Posterior distribution",
      TRUE ~ x_chr
    )
    factor(out, levels = c(
      "Prior predictive distribution",
      "Posterior distribution"
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(bt_long_all) && nrow(bt_long_all) > 0) {
    bt_long_all <- bt_long_all %>%
      filter(time <= ntimes) %>%
      mutate(
        scenario_label = albacore_scenario_label(scenario),
        year = factor(years[time], levels = years)
      )
    bt_single_var <- length(unique(as.character(bt_long_all$var))) == 1

    p_alb_bt <- ggplot(bt_long_all, aes(x = year, y = value, fill = model)) +
      geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7, outlier.size = 0.35) +
      {
        if (bt_single_var) {
          facet_grid(scenario_label ~ ., scales = "free_y")
        } else {
          facet_grid(scenario_label ~ var, scales = "free_y")
        }
      } +
      labs(title = "AlbacoreFits biomass states", x = "Year", y = "Biomass (MT)") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
      )
    print(p_alb_bt)
    save_manuscript_plot(p_alb_bt, "albacore_biomass_states.png", width = 8.0, height = 10.5)

    bt_models <- sort(unique(as.character(bt_long_all$model)))
    for (mdl in bt_models) {
      dd <- dplyr::filter(bt_long_all, model == mdl)
      if (nrow(dd) == 0) next
      dd_single_var <- length(unique(as.character(dd$var))) == 1
      p_bt_panel <- ggplot(dd, aes(x = year, y = value, fill = model)) +
        geom_boxplot(width = 0.7, outlier.size = 0.35) +
        {
          if (dd_single_var) {
            facet_grid(scenario_label ~ ., scales = "free_y")
          } else {
            facet_grid(scenario_label ~ var, scales = "free_y")
          }
        } +
        labs(x = "Year", y = "Biomass (MT)", subtitle = mdl) +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
          plot.title = element_blank(),
          strip.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
          strip.text.x = element_text(size = 8)
        )
      save_manuscript_plot(
        p_bt_panel,
        sprintf("albacore_biomass_states_panel__%s.png", panel_slug(mdl)),
        width = 6.5,
        height = 8.5
      )
    }
  } else {
    cat("AlbacoreFits biomass plot data is missing or empty.\n")
  }
}
```

# ECDF difference overlay (paper version: exclude CV=no)

```{r paper_sbc_ecdf_difference_overlay, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found. Skipping paper ECDF plots.\n")
} else {
  build_ecdf_matrix_plot <- function(results_list, model_groups_subset, plot_title = NULL,
                                     show_legend = TRUE, fixed_color = NULL,
                                     share_y_within_row = TRUE,
                                     reference_results_list = NULL,
                                     reference_model_groups_subset = NULL,
                                     clip_result_levels = NULL,
                                     legend_title = "CV",
                                     legend_labels = NULL,
                                     include_loglik = FALSE) {
    model_keys <- names(model_groups_subset)
    if (length(model_keys) == 0) return(NULL)

    prepped <- lapply(model_keys, function(model_key) {
      prepare_ecdf_diff_overlay_data(
        results_list[model_groups_subset[[model_key]]],
        drop_loglik = !include_loglik
      )
    })
    names(prepped) <- model_keys

    limits_prepped <- prepped
    if (!is.null(reference_results_list) && !is.null(reference_model_groups_subset)) {
      ref_keys <- intersect(model_keys, names(reference_model_groups_subset))
      limits_prepped[ref_keys] <- lapply(ref_keys, function(model_key) {
        prepare_ecdf_diff_overlay_data(
          reference_results_list[reference_model_groups_subset[[model_key]]],
          drop_loglik = !include_loglik
        )
      })
      names(limits_prepped)[match(ref_keys, names(limits_prepped))] <- ref_keys
    }

    legend_levels <- unique(unlist(lapply(prepped, `[[`, "legend_levels")))
    legend_order <- c("0.1", "0.3", "0.5", "no")
    legend_levels <- c(intersect(legend_order, legend_levels), setdiff(legend_levels, legend_order))

    color_mapping <- c(
      "0.1" = "#F03B20",
      "0.3" = "#3182BD",
      "0.5" = "#4DAF4A",
      "no" = "#636363"
    )
    color_mapping <- color_mapping[legend_levels]
    if (!is.null(fixed_color) && length(legend_levels) > 0) {
      color_mapping[] <- fixed_color
    }

    ecdf_long <- bind_rows(lapply(model_keys, function(model_key) {
      prepped[[model_key]]$combined_ecdf_df %>%
        mutate(model = factor(model_key, levels = model_keys))
    }))
    ecdf_long <- ecdf_long %>%
      mutate(model = factor(model, levels = model_keys))

    limits_long <- bind_rows(lapply(model_keys, function(model_key) {
      lim_df <- limits_prepped[[model_key]]$limits_df_trans
      if (is.null(lim_df) || nrow(lim_df) == 0) return(NULL)
      lim_df %>% mutate(model = factor(model_key, levels = model_keys))
    }))
    if (!is.null(limits_long) && nrow(limits_long) == 0) {
      limits_long <- NULL
    }
    if (!is.null(limits_long) && !("group" %in% names(limits_long))) {
      if ("variable" %in% names(limits_long)) {
        limits_long <- limits_long %>% mutate(group = variable)
      } else {
        limits_long <- NULL
      }
    }

    if (!is.null(legend_labels)) {
      legend_labels <- legend_labels[legend_levels]
      legend_labels[is.na(legend_labels)] <- legend_levels[is.na(legend_labels)]
    }

    if (share_y_within_row && !is.null(clip_result_levels) && length(clip_result_levels) > 0) {
      row_limit_ecdf <- ecdf_long %>%
        dplyr::filter(!(as.character(result_name) %in% clip_result_levels)) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(y_abs = max(abs(z_diff), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

      row_limit_ref <- NULL
      if (!is.null(limits_long) && nrow(limits_long) > 0) {
        row_limit_ref <- limits_long %>%
          dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
          dplyr::summarise(
            y_abs_ref = max(abs(c(ymin, ymax)), na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"
          )
      }

      row_limits <- row_limit_ecdf
      if (!is.null(row_limit_ref) && nrow(row_limit_ref) > 0) {
        row_limits <- dplyr::full_join(row_limit_ecdf, row_limit_ref, by = "group")
      } else {
        row_limits$y_abs_ref <- NA_real_
      }

      row_limits <- row_limits %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          y_abs = pmax(y_abs, y_abs_ref, na.rm = TRUE),
          y_clip = dplyr::if_else(is.finite(y_abs) & y_abs > 0, y_abs * 1.03, y_abs)
        ) %>%
        dplyr::select(group, y_clip)

      ecdf_long <- ecdf_long %>%
        dplyr::left_join(row_limits, by = "group") %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          z_diff = dplyr::if_else(
            as.character(result_name) %in% clip_result_levels & is.finite(y_clip),
            dplyr::if_else(abs(z_diff) > y_clip, NA_real_, z_diff),
            z_diff
          )
        ) %>%
        dplyr::select(-y_clip)
    }

    clipped_ecdf_long <- NULL
    regular_ecdf_long <- ecdf_long
    if (share_y_within_row && !is.null(clip_result_levels) && length(clip_result_levels) > 0) {
      clipped_ecdf_long <- ecdf_long %>%
        dplyr::filter(as.character(result_name) %in% clip_result_levels)
      regular_ecdf_long <- ecdf_long %>%
        dplyr::filter(!(as.character(result_name) %in% clip_result_levels))

      if (include_loglik) {
        loglik_label <- format_parameter_label_plotmath("loglik")
        clipped_ecdf_long <- clipped_ecdf_long %>%
          dplyr::filter(as.character(group) != loglik_label)
      }
    }

    if (share_y_within_row) {
      p <- ggplot()
      if (!is.null(limits_long) && nrow(limits_long) > 0) {
        oval_long <- limits_long %>%
          dplyr::group_by(group, model) %>%
          dplyr::summarise(
            y_radius = max(abs(c(ymin, ymax)), na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) %>%
          dplyr::rowwise() %>%
          dplyr::do({
            y_radius <- as.numeric(.$y_radius[[1]])
            x_top <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 240)
            tibble::tibble(
              group = .$group,
              model = .$model,
              x = c(x_top, rev(x_top)),
              y = c(
                y_radius * sqrt(pmax(0, 1 - ((x_top - 0.5) / 0.5)^2)),
                -y_radius * sqrt(pmax(0, 1 - ((rev(x_top) - 0.5) / 0.5)^2))
              )
            )
          }) %>%
          dplyr::ungroup()

        p <- p +
          geom_polygon(
            data = oval_long,
            aes(x = x, y = y, group = interaction(group, model)),
            fill = "lightblue",
            alpha = 0.28,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_path(
            data = oval_long,
            aes(x = x, y = y, group = interaction(group, model)),
            color = "blue",
            alpha = 0.65,
            linewidth = 0.45
          ) +
          geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "blue", alpha = 0.85, linewidth = 0.55)
      }

      p <- p +
        geom_step(
          data = regular_ecdf_long,
          aes(x = z, y = z_diff, color = result_name, group = result_name),
          alpha = 0.88,
          linewidth = 0.8
        )

      if (!is.null(clipped_ecdf_long) && nrow(clipped_ecdf_long) > 0) {
        p <- p +
          geom_path(
            data = clipped_ecdf_long,
            aes(x = z, y = z_diff, color = result_name, group = result_name),
            alpha = 0.88,
            linewidth = 0.8,
            na.rm = TRUE
          )
      }

      p <- p +
        scale_color_manual(
          name = legend_title,
          values = color_mapping,
          breaks = legend_levels,
          labels = legend_labels
        ) +
        scale_x_continuous(
          breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1.0),
          labels = c("0.0", "0.5", "1.0"),
          limits = c(0, 1)
        ) +
        scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
        facet_grid(
          group ~ model,
          scales = "free_y",
          labeller = labeller(group = label_parsed)
        ) +
        labs(
          title = plot_title,
          x = "Normalized rank (PIT)",
          y = "ECDF Difference"
        ) +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
        theme(
          legend.position = if (show_legend) "bottom" else "none",
          legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
          strip.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
          strip.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
          panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
          panel.spacing.y = unit(0.55, "lines")
        ) +
        guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.6, alpha = 1), nrow = 1))

      return(p)
    }

    group_levels <- levels(ecdf_long$group)
    if (is.null(group_levels)) {
      group_levels <- unique(as.character(ecdf_long$group))
    }
    group_levels <- group_levels[group_levels %in% as.character(unique(ecdf_long$group))]

    oval_long <- NULL
    if (!is.null(limits_long) && nrow(limits_long) > 0) {
      oval_long <- limits_long %>%
        dplyr::group_by(group, model) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(
          y_radius = max(abs(c(ymin, ymax)), na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        dplyr::rowwise() %>%
        dplyr::do({
          y_radius <- as.numeric(.$y_radius[[1]])
          x_top <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 240)
          tibble::tibble(
            group = .$group,
            model = .$model,
            x = c(x_top, rev(x_top)),
            y = c(
              y_radius * sqrt(pmax(0, 1 - ((x_top - 0.5) / 0.5)^2)),
              -y_radius * sqrt(pmax(0, 1 - ((rev(x_top) - 0.5) / 0.5)^2))
            )
          )
        }) %>%
        dplyr::ungroup() %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          group = factor(as.character(group), levels = group_levels),
          model = factor(as.character(model), levels = model_keys)
        )
    }

    make_header_strip <- function(label) {
      ggplot() +
        annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = label, fontface = "bold", size = 6.2) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE, clip = "off") +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.margin = margin(4, 4, 12, 4))
    }

    make_row_label <- function(label) {
      ggplot() +
        annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = label, parse = TRUE, angle = -90, size = 7) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE, clip = "off") +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 8, 0, 12))
    }

    base_panel_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
      theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2)
      )

    make_panel_plot <- function(group_label, model_key, show_x = FALSE, show_y = FALSE) {
      panel_ecdf <- ecdf_long %>%
        dplyr::filter(as.character(group) == group_label, as.character(model) == model_key)
      panel_oval <- NULL
      if (!is.null(oval_long)) {
        panel_oval <- oval_long %>%
          dplyr::filter(as.character(group) == group_label, as.character(model) == model_key)
      }

      p_panel <- ggplot()
      if (!is.null(panel_oval) && nrow(panel_oval) > 0) {
        p_panel <- p_panel +
          geom_polygon(
            data = panel_oval,
            aes(x = x, y = y, group = 1),
            fill = "lightblue",
            alpha = 0.28,
            colour = NA
          ) +
          geom_path(
            data = panel_oval,
            aes(x = x, y = y, group = 1),
            color = "blue",
            alpha = 0.65,
            linewidth = 0.45
          ) +
          geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "blue", alpha = 0.85, linewidth = 0.55)
      }

      p_panel <- p_panel +
        geom_step(
          data = panel_ecdf,
          aes(x = z, y = z_diff, color = result_name, group = result_name),
          alpha = 0.88,
          linewidth = 0.8
        ) +
        scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping, breaks = legend_levels, drop = FALSE) +
        scale_x_continuous(
          breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1.0),
          labels = c("0.0", "0.5", "1.0"),
          limits = c(0, 1)
        ) +
        scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
        base_panel_theme

      if (show_x) {
        p_panel <- p_panel +
          theme(
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
            axis.ticks.x = element_line()
          )
      } else {
        p_panel <- p_panel +
          theme(
            axis.text.x = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
          )
      }

      if (show_y) {
        p_panel <- p_panel +
          theme(
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
            axis.ticks.y = element_line()
          )
      } else {
        p_panel <- p_panel +
          theme(
            axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
          )
      }

      p_panel
    }

    header_row <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      plotlist = c(lapply(model_keys, make_header_strip), list(ggplot() + theme_void())),
      nrow = 1,
      rel_widths = c(rep(1, length(model_keys)), 0.24)
    )

    row_plots <- lapply(seq_along(group_levels), function(i) {
      grp <- group_levels[i]
      panel_row <- lapply(seq_along(model_keys), function(j) {
        make_panel_plot(
          group_label = grp,
          model_key = model_keys[j],
          show_x = i == length(group_levels),
          show_y = TRUE
        )
      })
      cowplot::plot_grid(
        plotlist = c(panel_row, list(make_row_label(grp))),
        nrow = 1,
        align = "h",
        rel_widths = c(rep(1, length(model_keys)), 0.24)
      )
    })

    main_grid <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      plotlist = c(list(header_row), row_plots),
      ncol = 1,
      rel_heights = c(0.52, rep(1, length(row_plots)))
    )

    x_label <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "PIT", size = 9) +
      theme_void()
    y_label <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "ECDF Difference", angle = 90, size = 9) +
      theme_void()

    body <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      y_label,
      main_grid,
      nrow = 1,
      rel_widths = c(0.07, 0.93)
    )

    assembled <- cowplot::plot_grid(body, x_label, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.06))

    if (!is.null(plot_title) && nzchar(plot_title)) {
      title_grob <- ggplot() +
        annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0.5, label = plot_title, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", size = 6.5) +
        theme_void()
      assembled <- cowplot::plot_grid(title_grob, assembled, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.06, 0.94))
    }

    assembled
  }

  ordered_model_groups <- paper_model_groups[order(names(paper_model_groups))]
  ct_groups <- ordered_model_groups[grepl("^ct_", names(ordered_model_groups))]
  nct_groups <- ordered_model_groups[grepl("^nct_", names(ordered_model_groups))]
  no_results <- all_results[!vapply(names(all_results), keep_run, logical(1))]
  no_model_groups <- list()
  if (length(no_results) > 0) {
    parsed_no <- parse_sbc_stem(names(no_results))
    no_model_groups <- split(parsed_no$run_id, parsed_no$model_key)
    no_model_groups <- no_model_groups[order(names(no_model_groups))]
  }
  combined_model_groups <- list()
  if (length(all_results) > 0) {
    parsed_all <- parse_sbc_stem(names(all_results))
    combined_model_groups <- split(parsed_all$run_id, parsed_all$model_key)
    combined_model_groups <- combined_model_groups[order(names(combined_model_groups))]
  }
  ct_all_groups <- combined_model_groups[grepl("^ct_", names(combined_model_groups))]
  nct_all_groups <- combined_model_groups[grepl("^nct_", names(combined_model_groups))]
  ecdf_legend_labels <- c(
    "0.1" = "0.1",
    "0.3" = "0.3",
    "0.5" = "0.5",
    "no" = "No obs. info"
  )

  ecdf_panel_plots <- lapply(ordered_model_groups, function(model_subset) {
    plot_ecdf_diff_overlay(
      paper_results[model_subset],
      base_size = 13,
      facet_ncol = 5,
      legend_ncol = 3
    )
  })
  ecdf_panel_plots <- ecdf_panel_plots[order(names(ecdf_panel_plots))]
  save_plot_list_panels(ecdf_panel_plots, "paper_sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay_panel", width = 10.5, height = 6.2)

  p_ecdf_all <- build_ecdf_matrix_plot(
    all_results,
    combined_model_groups,
    reference_results_list = paper_results,
    reference_model_groups_subset = ordered_model_groups,
    clip_result_levels = "no",
    legend_title = "CV",
    legend_labels = ecdf_legend_labels,
    include_loglik = TRUE
  )
  p_ecdf_ct <- build_ecdf_matrix_plot(
    all_results,
    ct_all_groups,
    reference_results_list = paper_results,
    reference_model_groups_subset = ct_groups,
    clip_result_levels = "no",
    legend_title = "CV",
    legend_labels = ecdf_legend_labels,
    include_loglik = TRUE
  )
  p_ecdf_nct <- build_ecdf_matrix_plot(
    all_results,
    nct_all_groups,
    reference_results_list = paper_results,
    reference_model_groups_subset = nct_groups,
    clip_result_levels = "no",
    legend_title = "CV",
    legend_labels = ecdf_legend_labels,
    include_loglik = TRUE
  )
  p_ecdf_no <- NULL

  if (!is.null(p_ecdf_all)) {
    print(p_ecdf_all)
    save_manuscript_plot(p_ecdf_all, "paper_sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay_cv_only.png", width = 22, height = 17.5)
  }
  if (!is.null(p_ecdf_ct)) {
    save_manuscript_plot(p_ecdf_ct, "paper_sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay_ct_cv_only.png", width = 13, height = 15)
  }
  if (!is.null(p_ecdf_nct)) {
    save_manuscript_plot(p_ecdf_nct, "paper_sbc_ecdf_diff_overlay_nct_cv_only.png", width = 13, height = 15)
  }
}
```

# Divergent transitions

```{r paper_sbc_divergent_transition_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found. Skipping divergence plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    n_divergent <- require_sbc_diag_column(result, model_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_divergent")
    n_sample <- all_nsamples[[model_name]]
    data.frame(
      n_divergent = n_divergent,
      percentage = (n_divergent / n_sample) * 100,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  div_fit_rate <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(cv_group, model_group) %>%
    summarise(
      pct_any_div = 100 * mean(n_divergent > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      label = sprintf("Any div.: %.1f%%", pct_any_div),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  p_div_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percentage)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y", labeller = paper_cv_labeller) +
    geom_text(
      data = div_fit_rate,
      aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = label),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 1.05,
      vjust = 1.1,
      size = 3.6,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Divergent transition rate across SBC fits",
      subtitle = "Panel label = share of SBC refits with at least one divergent transition",
      x = "Divergent transitions (% of post-warmup draws)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y.right = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
    )
  print(p_div_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_div_hist, "paper_sbc_divergence_histograms_cv_only.png", width = 14, height = 7.6)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "percentage",
    prefix = "paper_sbc_divergence_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Divergent transitions (% of post-warmup draws)",
    x_scale = scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)),
    angle_x = TRUE
  )
}
```

# Minimum bulk ESS

```{r paper_sbc_effective_sample_size_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found. Skipping ESS plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    min_ess_bulk <- require_sbc_diag_column(result, model_name, "default_diagnostics", "min_ess_bulk")
    nchains <- all_nchains[[model_name]]
    data.frame(
      min_ess_bulk = min_ess_bulk,
      percentage = (min_ess_bulk / (nchains * 100)) * 100,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_ess_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percentage)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y", labeller = paper_cv_labeller) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Minimum bulk ESS threshold performance across SBC fits",
      x = "min bulk ESS as % of (100 x nchains)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y.right = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
    )
  print(p_ess_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_ess_hist, "paper_sbc_ess_histograms_cv_only.png", width = 12, height = 6.5)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "percentage",
    prefix = "paper_sbc_ess_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "min bulk ESS as % of (100 x nchains)",
    x_scale = scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)),
    x_vline = 100,
    angle_x = TRUE
  )
}
```

# Treedepth saturation

```{r paper_sbc_treedepth_saturation_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found. Skipping treedepth plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    n_max_treedepth <- require_sbc_diag_column(result, model_name, "backend_diagnostics", "n_max_treedepth")
    n_sample <- all_nsamples[[model_name]]
    data.frame(
      n_max_treedepth = n_max_treedepth,
      percentage = (n_max_treedepth / n_sample) * 100,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_treedepth_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percentage)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y", labeller = paper_cv_labeller) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Max treedepth saturation across SBC fits",
      x = "Transitions hitting max treedepth (% of post-warmup draws)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y.right = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
    )
  print(p_treedepth_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_treedepth_hist, "paper_sbc_treedepth_histograms_cv_only.png", width = 12, height = 6.5)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "percentage",
    prefix = "paper_sbc_treedepth_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Transitions hitting max treedepth (% of post-warmup draws)",
    x_scale = scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)),
    angle_x = TRUE
  )
}
```

# R-hat

```{r paper_sbc_rhat_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found. Skipping R-hat plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    max_rhat <- require_sbc_diag_column(result, model_name, "default_diagnostics", "max_rhat")
    data.frame(
      max_rhat = max_rhat,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_rhat_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = max_rhat)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y", labeller = paper_cv_labeller) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 1.01, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
      title = "Maximum R-hat across SBC fits",
      x = "Maximum R-hat",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y.right = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
    )
  print(p_rhat_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_rhat_hist, "paper_sbc_rhat_histograms_cv_only.png", width = 12, height = 6.5)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "max_rhat",
    prefix = "paper_sbc_rhat_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Maximum R-hat",
    x_vline = 1.01
  )
}
```

# Maximum chain runtime

```{r paper_sbc_chain_time_histograms, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found. Skipping chain time plots.\n")
} else {
  plot_data <- imap_dfr(all_results, function(result, model_name) {
    max_chain_time <- require_sbc_diag_column(result, model_name, "backend_diagnostics", "max_chain_time")
    data.frame(
      max_chain_time = max_chain_time,
      model_name = model_name
    )
  })
  plot_data <- add_sbc_model_cv_groups(plot_data)
  p_chain_hist <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = max_chain_time)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "#2F7F95", alpha = 0.75) +
    facet_grid(cv_group ~ model_group, scales = "free_y", labeller = paper_cv_labeller) +
    labs(
      title = "Maximum chain runtime across SBC fits",
      x = "Time (seconds)",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    paper_theme() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      strip.text.y.right = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
    )
  print(p_chain_hist)
  save_manuscript_plot(p_chain_hist, "paper_sbc_chain_time_histograms_cv_only.png", width = 12, height = 6.5)
  save_sbc_perf_panel_plots(
    plot_data = plot_data,
    x_col = "max_chain_time",
    prefix = "paper_sbc_chain_time_histograms_panel",
    x_label = "Time (seconds)",
    angle_x = TRUE
  )
}
```

# Simulated values by treedepth-saturation group

```{r paper_sim_values_by_treedepth_group, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping treedepth subset plots.\n")
} else {
  pretty_by_run <- vapply(names(all_results), format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  model_key_by_run <- sub("_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "", pretty_by_run)
  cv_key_by_run <- sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", pretty_by_run)
  unique_models <- unique(model_key_by_run)
  ct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^ct_", unique_models)]))
  nct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^nct_", unique_models)]))
```
