```{r paper_sim_values_by_treedepth_group, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
  model_order <- c(ct_models, nct_models, setdiff(unique_models, c(ct_models, nct_models)))
  cv_order <- c("no", "cv0.1", "cv0.3", "cv0.5")

  target_vars <- c("K", "r", "q", "sigma2", "tau2", "Pt[23]")
  td_subset_plots <- list()

  for (mdl in model_order) {
    run_names <- names(all_results)[model_key_by_run == mdl]
    run_names <- run_names[order(match(cv_key_by_run[match(run_names, names(all_results))], cv_order), run_names)]
    overall_truth_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }
      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable) %>%
        summarise(value = first(simulated_value), .groups = "drop") %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        )
    }))
    sim_vals_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      backend <- res$backend_diagnostics
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(backend) || is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "n_max_treedepth") %in% names(backend)) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }

      n_sample <- all_nsamples[[selected_name]]
      if (is.null(n_sample) || !is.finite(n_sample) || n_sample <= 0) n_sample <- 1
      td_pct <- (backend$n_max_treedepth / n_sample) * 100
      sim_low <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[td_pct < 10]))
      sim_high <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[td_pct >= 90]))
      sim_low <- sim_low[!is.na(sim_low)]
      sim_high <- sim_high[!is.na(sim_high)]
      if (length(sim_low) == 0 || length(sim_high) == 0) return(NULL)

      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars, sim_id %in% c(sim_low, sim_high)) %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(simulated_value, .Machine$double.eps)), simulated_value),
          td_group = case_when(
            sim_id %in% sim_low ~ "low_td(<10%)",
            sim_id %in% sim_high ~ "high_td(>=90%)",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
          ),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        ) %>%
        filter(!is.na(td_group)) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable, td_group, cv_group, cv_label) %>%
        summarise(value = first(value), .groups = "drop")
    }))
    if (is.null(sim_vals_all) || nrow(sim_vals_all) == 0) next

    cv_labels_present <- unique(sim_vals_all[, c("cv_group", "cv_label")])
    cv_labels_present <- cv_labels_present[order(match(cv_labels_present$cv_group, cv_order), cv_labels_present$cv_group), ]
    cv_label_map <- setNames(as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_label), as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_group))
    cv_label_display_map <- setNames(format_cv_label(cv_labels_present$cv_label), as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_label))

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      filter(!(cv_label == "no" & variable == "tau2")) %>%
      mutate(
        td_group = factor(td_group, levels = c("low_td(<10%)", "high_td(>=90%)")),
        cv_label = factor(cv_label, levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        cv_label_display = factor(
          cv_label_display_map[as.character(cv_label)],
          levels = format_cv_label(cv_labels_present$cv_label)
        ),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      filter(!(cv_label == "no" & variable == "tau2")) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(cv_label_map[as.character(cv_label)], levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        cv_label_display = factor(
          cv_label_display_map[as.character(cv_label)],
          levels = format_cv_label(cv_labels_present$cv_label)
        ),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(cv_label), !is.na(variable_label))
    td_counts <- sim_vals_all %>%
      distinct(sim_id, td_group, cv_label) %>%
      count(cv_label, td_group) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = td_group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
      mutate(
        `low_td(<10%)` = if ("low_td(<10%)" %in% names(.)) `low_td(<10%)` else 0L,
        `high_td(>=90%)` = if ("high_td(>=90%)" %in% names(.)) `high_td(>=90%)` else 0L
      )

    valid_cv_labels <- td_counts %>%
      filter(`low_td(<10%)` > 0, `high_td(>=90%)` > 0) %>%
      pull(cv_label) %>%
      as.character() %>%
      unique()
    if (length(valid_cv_labels) == 0) next

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        cv_label_display = factor(format_cv_label(as.character(cv_label)), levels = format_cv_label(valid_cv_labels)),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        cv_label_display = factor(format_cv_label(as.character(cv_label)), levels = format_cv_label(valid_cv_labels)),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    td_counts <- td_counts %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels))

    td_count_note <- td_counts %>%
      arrange(cv_label) %>%
      transmute(
        note = sprintf(
          "%s: n_low=%d, n_high=%d",
          format_cv_label(as.character(cv_label)),
          `low_td(<10%)`,
          `high_td(>=90%)`
        )
      ) %>%
      pull(note) %>%
      paste(collapse = "   |   ")

    p_td_subset <- ggplot(sim_vals_all, aes(x = value, y = after_stat(ndensity), fill = td_group)) +
      geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.55, bins = 35) +
      geom_density(
        data = overall_truth_all,
        aes(x = value, y = after_stat(scaled), group = interaction(cv_label_display, variable_label)),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        colour = "black",
        linewidth = 0.4,
        adjust = 1.1
      ) +
      facet_grid(
        cv_label_display ~ variable_label,
        scales = "free",
        labeller = labeller(variable_label = label_parsed, cv_label_display = label_value)
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("low_td(<10%)" = "#1f78b4", "high_td(>=90%)" = "#e31a1c"),
        name = "Treedepth group"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = gsub("_", " ", mdl, fixed = TRUE),
        x = "Simulated value",
        y = "Scaled density",
        caption = td_count_note
      ) +
      paper_theme() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 8.5),
        plot.caption.position = "plot"
      )

    td_subset_plots[[mdl]] <- p_td_subset
  }

  if (length(td_subset_plots) == 0) {
    cat("No models had both subsets: <10% and >=90% treedepth saturation.\n")
  } else {
    invisible(lapply(td_subset_plots, print))
    td_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(td_subset_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.0, max_cols = 2, max_h = 20)
    save_plot_grid(
      td_subset_plots,
      filename = "sim_values_by_treedepth_subset.png",
      ncol = td_dims$ncol,
      width = td_dims$width,
      height = td_dims$height
    )
    save_plot_list_panels(td_subset_plots, "sim_values_by_treedepth_subset_panel", width = 10.5, height = 7.5)
  }
}
```

# Simulated values by divergence group

```{r paper_sim_values_by_divergence_group, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.dim=c(12,8)}
if (!has_sbc_results) {
  cat("No SBC results found in ../results. Skipping divergence subset plots.\n")
} else {
  pretty_by_run <- vapply(names(all_results), format_sbc_run_label, character(1))
  model_key_by_run <- sub("_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "", pretty_by_run)
  cv_key_by_run <- sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", pretty_by_run)
  unique_models <- unique(model_key_by_run)
  ct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^ct_", unique_models)]))
  nct_models <- sort(unique(unique_models[grepl("^nct_", unique_models)]))
  model_order <- c(ct_models, nct_models, setdiff(unique_models, c(ct_models, nct_models)))
  cv_order <- c("no", "cv0.1", "cv0.3", "cv0.5")

  target_vars <- c("K", "r", "q", "sigma2", "tau2", "Pt[23]")
  div_subset_plots <- list()

  for (mdl in model_order) {
    run_names <- names(all_results)[model_key_by_run == mdl]
    run_names <- run_names[order(match(cv_key_by_run[match(run_names, names(all_results))], cv_order), run_names)]
    overall_truth_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }
      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable) %>%
        summarise(value = first(simulated_value), .groups = "drop") %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(value, .Machine$double.eps)), value),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        )
    }))
    sim_vals_all <- bind_rows(lapply(run_names, function(selected_name) {
      res <- all_results[[selected_name]]
      backend <- res$backend_diagnostics
      stats_df <- res$stats
      if (is.null(backend) || is.null(stats_df) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "n_divergent") %in% names(backend)) ||
          !all(c("sim_id", "variable", "simulated_value") %in% names(stats_df))) {
        return(NULL)
      }

      sim_no_div <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[backend$n_divergent == 0]))
      sim_has_div <- sort(unique(backend$sim_id[backend$n_divergent > 0]))
      sim_no_div <- sim_no_div[!is.na(sim_no_div)]
      sim_has_div <- sim_has_div[!is.na(sim_has_div)]
      if (length(sim_no_div) == 0 || length(sim_has_div) == 0) return(NULL)

      stats_df %>%
        filter(variable %in% target_vars, sim_id %in% c(sim_no_div, sim_has_div)) %>%
        mutate(
          value = ifelse(variable == "q", log(pmax(simulated_value, .Machine$double.eps)), simulated_value),
          div_group = case_when(
            sim_id %in% sim_no_div ~ "no_div(=0)",
            sim_id %in% sim_has_div ~ "has_div(>0)",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
          ),
          cv_group = sub("^.*_(cv[^_]+|no)$", "\\1", format_sbc_run_label(selected_name)),
          cv_label = cv_group
        ) %>%
        filter(!is.na(div_group)) %>%
        group_by(sim_id, variable, div_group, cv_group, cv_label) %>%
        summarise(value = first(value), .groups = "drop")
    }))
    if (is.null(sim_vals_all) || nrow(sim_vals_all) == 0) next

    cv_labels_present <- unique(sim_vals_all[, c("cv_group", "cv_label")])
    cv_labels_present <- cv_labels_present[order(match(cv_labels_present$cv_group, cv_order), cv_labels_present$cv_group), ]
    cv_label_map <- setNames(as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_label), as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_group))
    cv_label_display_map <- setNames(format_cv_label(cv_labels_present$cv_label), as.character(cv_labels_present$cv_label))

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      filter(!(cv_label == "no" & variable == "tau2")) %>%
      mutate(
        div_group = factor(div_group, levels = c("no_div(=0)", "has_div(>0)")),
        cv_label = factor(cv_label, levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        cv_label_display = factor(
          cv_label_display_map[as.character(cv_label)],
          levels = format_cv_label(cv_labels_present$cv_label)
        ),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      filter(!(cv_label == "no" & variable == "tau2")) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(cv_label_map[as.character(cv_label)], levels = cv_labels_present$cv_label),
        cv_label_display = factor(
          cv_label_display_map[as.character(cv_label)],
          levels = format_cv_label(cv_labels_present$cv_label)
        ),
        variable_label = factor(
          ifelse(
            variable == "Pt[23]",
            "P[1989]",
            ifelse(variable == "q", "log(q)", param_label_parse(variable))
          ),
          levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]")
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(cv_label), !is.na(variable_label))
    div_counts <- sim_vals_all %>%
      distinct(sim_id, div_group, cv_label) %>%
      count(cv_label, div_group) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = div_group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
      mutate(
        `no_div(=0)` = if ("no_div(=0)" %in% names(.)) `no_div(=0)` else 0L,
        `has_div(>0)` = if ("has_div(>0)" %in% names(.)) `has_div(>0)` else 0L
      )

    valid_cv_labels <- div_counts %>%
      filter(`no_div(=0)` > 0, `has_div(>0)` > 0) %>%
      pull(cv_label) %>%
      as.character() %>%
      unique()
    if (length(valid_cv_labels) == 0) next

    sim_vals_all <- sim_vals_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        cv_label_display = factor(format_cv_label(as.character(cv_label)), levels = format_cv_label(valid_cv_labels)),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    overall_truth_all <- overall_truth_all %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(
        cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels),
        cv_label_display = factor(format_cv_label(as.character(cv_label)), levels = format_cv_label(valid_cv_labels)),
        variable_label = factor(as.character(variable_label), levels = c("K", "r", "log(q)", "sigma^2", "tau^2", "P[1989]"))
      )
    div_counts <- div_counts %>%
      filter(as.character(cv_label) %in% valid_cv_labels) %>%
      mutate(cv_label = factor(as.character(cv_label), levels = valid_cv_labels))

    count_note <- div_counts %>%
      arrange(cv_label) %>%
      transmute(
        note = sprintf(
          "%s: n0=%d, n+=%d",
          format_cv_label(as.character(cv_label)),
          `no_div(=0)`,
          `has_div(>0)`
        )
      ) %>%
      pull(note) %>%
      paste(collapse = "   |   ")

    p_div_subset <- ggplot(sim_vals_all, aes(x = value, y = after_stat(ndensity), fill = div_group)) +
      geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.55, bins = 35) +
      geom_density(
        data = overall_truth_all,
        aes(x = value, y = after_stat(scaled), group = interaction(cv_label_display, variable_label)),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        colour = "black",
        linewidth = 0.4,
        adjust = 1.1
      ) +
      facet_grid(
        cv_label_display ~ variable_label,
        scales = "free",
        labeller = labeller(variable_label = label_parsed, cv_label_display = label_value)
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("no_div(=0)" = "#1f78b4", "has_div(>0)" = "#e31a1c"),
        name = "Divergence group"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = gsub("_", " ", mdl, fixed = TRUE),
        x = "Simulated value",
        y = "Scaled density",
        caption = count_note
      ) +
      paper_theme() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 8.5),
        plot.caption.position = "plot"
      )

    div_subset_plots[[mdl]] <- p_div_subset
  }

  if (length(div_subset_plots) == 0) {
    cat("No models had both divergence subsets: =0 and >0.\n")
  } else {
    invisible(lapply(div_subset_plots, print))
    div_dims <- grid_layout_dims(length(div_subset_plots), panel_w = 7.0, panel_h = 5.0, max_cols = 2, max_h = 20)
    save_plot_grid(
      div_subset_plots,
      filename = "sim_values_by_divergence_subset.png",
      ncol = div_dims$ncol,
      width = div_dims$width,
      height = div_dims$height
    )
    save_plot_list_panels(div_subset_plots, "sim_values_by_divergence_subset_panel", width = 10.5, height = 7.5)
  }
}
```
